runs_executed_by: operator (local Windows, HuggingFace access) — documented from PR #336
decision: WINNER: Xenova/bge-small-en-v1.5 — M2=70.0% (target met); default swapped in PR #336

candidates.notes: Prior default. General-purpose sentence embedding. SBERT score ~58.8 on MTEB.
BGE (BAAI General Embeddings) dense-retrieval specialist. MTEB retrieval > MiniLM. Auto-accept gate fires on 72% of queries (36/50 strong-band). D2 gate active.
candidates.idempotency: confirmed (pnpm --filter @yakcc/registry test clean; bge-small now default via PR #336)
candidates.verdict: WINNER — M2 target met; default swapped

candidates.notes: Microsoft E5 model. Mis-calibrated without 'query: ' prefix. Tested without prefix per plan (baseline gap check first). Results confirm reject.
candidates.verdict: Reject — below baseline on all metrics; prefix-wrapper work deferred

candidates.notes: 12-layer variant. Marginally higher M2 (72.5%) than bge-small but 0/50 strong-band — entire corpus collapses to weak band. D2 auto-accept gate never fires; discovery would always surface 'weak match, choose' defeating D-HOOK-4 inline-substitution contract.
candidates.verdict: Reject — strong-band collapse; D2 auto-accept never fires despite higher M2

candidates.notes: 768-dim; requires schema migration (FLOAT[384] → FLOAT[768]). Out of scope for this WI.

outcome.action_taken: Default swapped in packages/contracts/src/embeddings.ts (PR #336); DEC-EMBED-MODEL-DEFAULT-002 recorded in MASTER_PLAN; DEC-V3-INITIATIVE-002 closed
outcome.follow_up_wis: none required — target met; D1 multi-vector definitively unjustified (multi-aspect is bge-small's best category)
